articles.title: ATF, Commercial LPG and Petrol, Diesel Prices Slashed from July 1: Check Latest Rates
articles.description: ATF, commercial LPG and Nayara petrol, diesel prices have been cut from July 1 as global crude eases, offering relief to airlines and businesses. Check latest fuel and LPG rates in Delhi, Lucknow, Kolkata, Patna and across India, plus details on revised export duties and excise policy.

articles.title: Delhi govt notifies EV policy, offers tax exemption for electric cars priced up to Rs 30 lakh
articles.description: Delhi has unveiled its Electric Vehicles Policy 2026, aiming to boost EV adoption and improve air quality. Effective July 1, 2026, electric cars under Rs 30 lakh will enjoy full road tax and registration fee exemptions. The policy also mandates electric auto-rickshaw registrations from January 2027 and phases out petrol/CNG two-wheeler registrations by April 2028, offering subsidies for e-two-wheelers.

articles.title: Kia Seltos GTX(O), X-Line(O) variants launched in India: Check price, features, ADAS, engine options and other details
articles.description: Kia India has launched two new top-tier Seltos variants, GTX(O) and X-Line(O), enhancing the SUV with advanced Level 2+ ADAS features and premium tech. These models offer turbo-petrol and diesel automatic options, boasting features like a 12.3-inch digital display and Head-Up Display. The X-Line(O) adds exclusive styling, aiming to bolster the Seltos' strong market position.

articles.title: US consumer attitudes up slightly
articles.description: WASHINGTON -- Americans' attitudes toward the economy improved slightly last month as gas prices declined, but their outlook is still mostly negative by historical standards.

articles.description: The sharpest provisions are the registration bans. From January 1, 2027, only electric autorickshaws will be eligible for new registrations. From April 1, 2028, petrol and CNG two-wheelers go the same way.

articles.title: Petrol Relief Ahead? Commercial LPG, Jet Fuel, Nayara's Price Cut Spark Hope
articles.description: Nayara has cut petrol and diesel prices, but PSU oil firms are yet to follow. Analysts say global crude trends and recent losses will determine any broader fuel price cut.
